author: y4rr
content:
Phase 5 V3 batch 1: NVMe L3 tier landed.

Added: paged/disk.rs (DiskBacking with POSIX pread/pwrite, single sparse-allocated file with global-block-index addressing). Tier::Disk variant. TieredBlockStore now three-tier (Vram → Host → Disk) with separate vram_lru and host_lru queues, host_bytes_in_use, disk_present set. TierBudget gains host_bytes: Option<usize> for host RAM limit. New constructor with_disk(shape, budget, Arc<DiskBacking>). ensure_resident walks Disk→Host→Vram chain, faulting from disk on demand. insert_host spills LRU host blocks to disk when host_budget exceeded. Metrics: disk_reads, disk_writes, bytes_read_from_disk, bytes_written_to_disk, disk_read_stalls, disk_write_stalls.

Tests: 74 pass. New disk-tier integration test (host_spill_to_disk_and_fault_back) verifies block survives the full round trip Vram → Host → Disk → Host → Vram with bit-exact data preservation.

Remaining V3 work (deferred to follow-up issues): generic store over T (Pod), paged embed_tokens/lm_head, paged attention head-level, KV cache + KV cache paging, async DMA prefetch, internal tooling
